mapper.update: UPDATE learning_progress SET progress=#{progress},last_learn_time=NOW(),update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM learning_progress WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_progress SET deleted=1,update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(progress) FROM learning_progress WHERE course_id=#{courseId} AND deleted=0
SELECT AVG(lp.progress) FROM learning_progress lp JOIN user u ON lp.user_id=u.id WHERE u.dept_id=#{deptId} AND lp.deleted=0 AND u.deleted=0
